name: git-go
description: Visual representation of your Git repository, with actions to manage commits, branches, stashes, and tags.

git-go.graph.rounded.markdownDescription: **Graph Appearance:** Use rounded corners for all commit graph elements.

git-go.graph.theme.markdownDescription: **Graph Appearance:** Color theme for the commit graph branches and dots.

git-go.graph.customColors.markdownDescription: **Graph Appearance:** Custom color palette for branches. Theme needs to be set to 'custom'. Use hex color codes (e.g., #3b82f6).

git-go.graph.expandedCommitHeight.markdownDescription: **Graph Appearance:** Height in pixels for expanded commit details view.

git-go.autoOpen.enabled.markdownDescription: **Auto-Open Behavior:** Automatically open Git Go when VS Code opens in a git repository.

git-go.autoOpen.pinTab.markdownDescription: **Auto-Open Behavior:** Automatically pin the Git Go tab when opened.

git-go.statusBar.enabled.markdownDescription: **Interface Elements:** Show a Status Bar Item that opens the Git Go Graph when clicked.

git-go.branch.create.checkout.markdownDescription: **Branch Operations:** Default value for 'Checkout new branch' when creating a branch.

git-go.branch.delete.force.markdownDescription: **Branch Operations:** Default value for 'Force delete' when deleting a branch.

git-go.branch.push.setUpstream.markdownDescription: **Branch Operations:** Default value for 'Set upstream' when pushing a branch.

git-go.branch.rebase.ignoreDate.markdownDescription: **Branch Operations:** Default value for 'Ignore date' when rebasing a branch.

git-go.merge.fastForwardIfPossible.markdownDescription: **Merge Operations:** Default value for 'Fast forward if possible' when merging branches.

git-go.merge.squash.markdownDescription: **Merge Operations:** Default value for 'Squash commits' when merging branches.

git-go.merge.noCommit.markdownDescription: **Merge Operations:** Default value for 'Don't commit automatically' when merging branches.

git-go.cherryPick.recordOrigin.markdownDescription: **Cherry-Pick Operations:** Default value for 'Record origin' when cherry-picking commits.

git-go.cherryPick.noCommit.markdownDescription: **Cherry-Pick Operations:** Default value for 'Don't commit automatically' when cherry-picking commits.

git-go.revert.noCommit.markdownDescription: **Revert Operations:** Default value for 'Don't commit automatically' when reverting commits.

git-go.remote.fetch.forceFetch.markdownDescription: **Remote Operations:** Default value for 'Force fetch' when fetching remote branches into local branches.

git-go.stash.includeUntracked.markdownDescription: **Stash Operations:** Default value for 'Include untracked files' when creating stashes.

scripts.build: pnpm run compile && cd panel && pnpm run build
